// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class MultiValueBindingsImpl extends MultiValueBindings:
    import MultiValueBindingsImpl.*

    def readInto(fd: Int, buf: Buffer[Byte])(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.Fiber.Unsafe[kyo.example.golden.ReadResult, Any] =
        kyo.ffi.internal.BlockingBridge.run {
            val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.MultiValueBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
            val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
            try
                val bufSeg = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[MemorySegment](buf.raw.asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[MemorySegment], "MemorySegment on JVM", "kyo.example.MultiValueBindings", "readInto")
                val __kyoMultiOut$ = __kyoScratch$.alloc(4L, 4L, "kyo.example.MultiValueBindings", "readInto")
                val eofOut = __kyoMultiOut$.asSlice(0L, 4L)
                val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(captureLayout.byteSize(), captureLayout.byteAlignment(), "kyo.example.MultiValueBindings", "readInto")
                val retVal: Int = readIntoMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, fd, bufSeg, eofOut)
                kyo.example.golden.ReadResult(retVal, eofOut.get(JAVA_INT, 0L) != 0)
            finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
        }
end MultiValueBindingsImpl

object MultiValueBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.MultiValueBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_mv")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")
    private val captureLayout = Linker.Option.captureStateLayout()

    private val readIntoMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("read_into").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.of(JAVA_INT, JAVA_INT, ADDRESS, ADDRESS),
        capture
    )
end MultiValueBindingsImpl
